title: rubus subornatus
intro: Rubus subornatus is a type of edible wild raspberry native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus subornatus include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its leaves and fruits can also be consumed fresh or used in traditional herbal remedies.
